title: Russian-Style Robust Semolina Wraps
description: A hearty breakfast dish featuring robust semolina wraps filled with a savory, Russian-inspired filling.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine semolina flour and cubed black bread.
In a separate bowl, whisk together scrambled eggs, mozzarella cheese, salt, and black pepper.
Add the egg mixture to the semolina mixture and mix until well combined.
Divide the mixture into 6-8 portions and shape each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Cook the semolina disks for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve the semolina disks wrapped in a wrap with your favorite fillings.
